whatsNew: 🔗 Secure Share fix: the 'Include documents' option now always appears when sharing entries that have linked documents — previously it could silently go missing on swipe-share and multi-select shares until you'd opened the Docs tab
⏱️ Expiry picker fix: switching document sharing off no longer leaves a hidden 6-hour expiry selected with nothing highlighted
🏷️ Custom fields are now visible to share recipients — both in shared-entry links and in combined entry+document shares
👆 Sharing now asks for your PIN when the vault was unlocked with biometrics — same protection as viewing documents
❌ Closing the share sheet mid-upload now cancels the share and removes anything already uploaded — and Manage Shares gained a Copy Link button so no link is ever lost
🧹 Recipient page: expired links now stop working the moment they expire (even in an already-open tab), plus a memory leak fix when viewing multiple files

features.title: Passwords & Credentials
features.desc: Store logins, app credentials, WiFi passwords, and notes. All entries are AES-256 encrypted on your device before anything is saved.

features.title: Categories & Search
features.desc: Entries are organised by type — App, WiFi, Note, Card, Bank, Identity. Filter by category or search across all entries instantly.

features.title: Favourites
features.desc: Star frequently used entries to pin them in the Starred tab for quick access.

features.title: Password Health
features.desc: Tap the shield icon on the home screen to review weak, duplicate, or old passwords. Helps you stay on top of security hygiene.

features.title: Documents
features.desc: Store encrypted files — PDFs, images, and more. Scan multi-page documents straight into a single PDF. Files are encrypted in IndexedDB on your device. Export as a zip backup anytime.

features.title: Biometric Unlock
features.desc: Enable fingerprint unlock from Settings → Security. Falls back to PIN if biometrics fail.

features.title: Cloud Sync
features.desc: Sign in with Google to back up your encrypted vault to Firestore. Your data is encrypted before it leaves your device — the cloud never sees plaintext.

features.title: Google Drive Backup
features.desc: Connect Google Drive to back up encrypted entries and documents automatically whenever they change. Restore everything on a new device with one tap. Drive only ever sees ciphertext.

features.title: Backup & Export
features.desc: Export an encrypted .vault file anytime from Settings → Backup. Import it on any device to restore. Documents can be exported separately as a .zip.

features.title: Secure Share
features.desc: Share one or several entries via a PIN-protected link that expires in 1h, 24h, or 7 days. Recipients see a premium ID-card style view.
